mechanism_narrative: A declining FEDFUNDS path lowers discount rates and signals easier liquidity conditions, so S&P 500 20-day forward returns turn positive when the policy rate is falling versus its recent level.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not higher than baseline after FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-month window, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend indicates deteriorating labor income prospects and weaker domestic demand, which should pressure equity prices and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the post-trigger average return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales RSAFS and industrial production INDPRO both deteriorate, the market is reading a broad demand shock rather than a sector-specific slowdown, so equities should fall over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint decline in RSAFS and INDPRO does not improve 5-day downside prediction relative to either series alone, or if the combined signal has a negative hit rate below 55% over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in INDPRO captures an industrial supply shock and falling output expectations, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month as earnings revisions compress.
failure_condition: Reject if large INDPRO declines are not followed by below-average 20-day SPX returns, or if the conditional average return is indistinguishable from zero at the 5% level.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in HOUST and RSAFS signals resilient household demand and stronger nominal spending, which should support equity returns over the next quarter through improved revenue expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if joint strength in HOUST and RSAFS does not outperform either series alone for 60-day SPX returns, or if the signal fails to generate positive returns in at least 55% of activated months.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is elevated while FEDFUNDS remains below the inflation trend, real policy rates are deeply negative and equities should reprice upward over the next 20 days on easier financial conditions.
failure_condition: Reject if high inflation relative to FEDFUNDS is not followed by higher 20-day SPX returns, or if the conditional effect reverses sign in a tightening cycle.

mechanism_narrative: A flat or declining PAYEMS series indicates payroll stabilization, which reduces recession probability and supports a short-horizon equity bounce over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if nondecreasing PAYEMS is not followed by positive 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the average return after stable payrolls is not above zero.

mechanism_narrative: In a recessionary demand shock, simultaneous weakness in GDPC1 and HOUST identifies a broad collapse in final demand and construction activity, which should generate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 contracts while HOUST is below its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous weakness in GDPC1 and HOUST does not forecast negative 60-day SPX returns, or if the joint signal loses directional accuracy below 50% in recession regimes.
